prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2026年第37名，近年稳定在35–37名区间，属顶尖211层次；2025年声誉评价偏正面，投档线稳步提升，从211第14名升至第3名，全国排名第31名；入选国家卓越工程师学院计划，保研率提升至27%；2026年声誉因实验室安全事故偏负面，但属历史偶发事件；抖音热度排名第61（一般）；力学A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、航空宇航科学与技术A-、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、软件工程A-，共7个A-及以上学科，航空航天特色鲜明。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等南航核心专业社会热度持续高热/推荐；河南省2026年考生总数约120万（不确定），较2025年物理类55.5万大幅增长，竞争加剧；南航位于江苏南京，属长三角热门地域，对河南考生吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招（+29.4%）使位次数字增大、声誉持续提升与专业热度高使位次数字减小、以及本省考生规模大幅增长等多重因素，扩招效应与竞争加剧效应相互抵消后，预计2026年最低位次较2025年基准小幅后移（位次数字增大）。预测最低位次约10020名，区间9520–10520名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 11294 → 9522 → 8771 → 8810 → 8687, showing an overall forward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 2600 places in the last 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 8687 places; the provincial science enrollment plan was 172 in 2021, 177 in 2022, 177 in 2023, 161 in 2024, and 170 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 220, an increase of 50 students (+29.4%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 37th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 35–37 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities; the 2025 reputation evaluation is relatively positive, with the admission threshold steadily rising from 14th to 3rd among 211 universities, and 31st nationally; selected for the National Excellent Engineer College program, with the graduate school recommendation rate rising to 27%; the 2026 reputation is slightly negative due to a laboratory safety accident, but it is a historical isolated incident; Douyin popularity ranking is 61st (average); Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Aerospace Science and Technology A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, with a total of 7 A- and above disciplines, featuring distinctive aerospace characteristics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other core majors at NUAA continue to be highly popular/recommended; the total number of candidates in Henan Province in 2026 is about 1.2 million (uncertain), a significant increase compared to 555,000 in the physics category in 2025, intensifying competition; NUAA is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a popular region in the Yangtze River Delta, which is attractive to Henan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the significant expansion in 2026 (+29.4%) which increases the ranking number, the continuous improvement in reputation and high major popularity which decrease the ranking number, and the substantial growth in the number of provincial candidates, the expansion effect and the intensified competition effect offset each other. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward (ranking number increases) compared to the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is about 10020, with a range of 9520–10520.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (9520–10520), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Electrical Engineering, Electronic Information, etc.), use Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Aerospace) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Nuclear Engineering, etc.) as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<9520), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>10520), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 2650 → 2452 → 2482 → 8811 → 3818. In 2024, due to the reform of the examination model (liberal arts → history category), the ranking significantly dropped to 8811, and in 2025 it rebounded to 3818. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 3818. The provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 26 students in 2021, 22 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 18 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend year by year. The 2026 plan is 12 students, a reduction of 6 students (-33.3%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction that intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 37th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities. NUAA is known for its strengths in science and engineering, with a relatively small scale of liberal arts programs. In 2025, its reputation is generally positive, but mainly affects applications in science and engineering. Douyin popularity ranking is 61st (average), with limited exposure related to liberal arts. The university's overall strengths lie in engineering fields such as aerospace, mechanics, and mechanics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as law and finance is divided and cautious. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Henan Province is approximately 1.2 million (uncertain). Based on the recent proportion of history category candidates at about 39%, the number of history category candidates is approximately 468,000, a significant increase from 352,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. NUAA is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a popular region in the Yangtze River Delta, which has some appeal to liberal arts candidates from Henan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-33.3%), which reduces the ranking number (intensifying competition), and the substantial increase in the number of local candidates further intensifying competition, but NUAA's liberal arts programs are small in scale and not its dominant disciplines, so application enthusiasm is relatively limited. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to the 2025 baseline (ranking number decreases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3084, with a range of 2584–3584.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (2584–3584), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Accounting, Administrative Management Composite Class) as the main target, Tier 1 majors (Law, Finance) as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors (English, Japanese, Radio and Television Studies) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2584), you can focus on aiming for Law; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>3584), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.
